question: List all Americans within normal range of height. Give me the distinct ids. Americans refers to region_name = 'USA'; normal range of height refers to height < 190;
orig_question: List all outpatient within normal range of creatinine phosphokinase. Give me the distinct ids. outpatient refers to Admission = '-'; normal range of creatinine phosphokinase refers to CPK < 250;
orig_masked: List all [C58] [C20] of [C20]. Give me the distinct [C63]. [C58] refers to [C58] = '[V2]'; [C20] of [C20] refers to [C20] < [V1];; [V1] is a value of the column [C20]; [V2] is a value of the column [C58]
evidence: Americans refers to region_name = 'USA'; normal range of height refers to height < 190;
orig_evidence: outpatient refers to Admission = '-'; normal range of creatinine phosphokinase refers to CPK < 250;
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM person as T1 INNER JOIN person_region as T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region as T3 ON T2.region_id = T3.id WHERE T3.region_name = 'USA' AND T1.height < 190
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CPK < 250 AND T1.Admission = '-'

question: Provide the salaries of the employees whose location cities are Boston.  salaries of the employees refers to salary; location cities are Boston refers to location.locationcity = 'Boston' WHERE locationID = employee.locationID;
orig_question: Provide the heights of the heroes whose eye colours are amber.  heights of the heroes refers to height_cm; eye colours are amber refers to colour.colour = 'Amber' WHERE eye_colour_id = colour.id;
orig_masked: Provide the [C23] of the [T9] whose [C19] are [V1].  [C23] of the [T9] refers to [C23]; [C19] are [V1] refers to [C5] = '[V1]' WHERE [C19] = [C6];; [V1] is a value of the column [C5]
evidence: salaries of the employees refers to salary; location cities are Boston refers to location.locationcity = 'Boston' WHERE locationID = employee.locationID;
orig_evidence: heights of the heroes refers to height_cm; eye colours are amber refers to colour.colour = 'Amber' WHERE eye_colour_id = colour.id;
gold_sql: SELECT T1.salary FROM employee as T1 INNER JOIN location as T2 ON T1.locationid = T2.locationid WHERE T2.locationcity = 'Boston'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.height_cm FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Amber'

question: Among all the inspections whose score is under 60, how many of them type is Routine - Unscheduled? score < 60; type refers to inspections.type; inspections.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled';
orig_question: Among all the players whose weight is under 130, how many of them preferred foot in attacking is left? weight < 130; preferred foot in attacking refers to preferred_foot; preferred_foot = 'left';
orig_masked: Among all the [T4] whose [C127] is under [V2], how many of them [C159] is [V1]? [C127] < [V2]; [C159] refers to [C159]; [C159] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C159]; [V2] is a value of the column [C127]
evidence: score < 60; type refers to inspections.type; inspections.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled';
orig_evidence: weight < 130; preferred foot in attacking refers to preferred_foot; preferred_foot = 'left';
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT (*) FROM inspections WHERE score < 60 AND score is not NULL AND type = 'Routine - Unscheduled'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.weight < 130 AND t2.preferred_foot = 'left'

question: Provide the heroes of movies with total gross between $100,000,000 to $150,000,000.  heroes of movies refers to hero; total gross between $100,000,000 to $150,000,000 refers to total_gross BETWEEN $100,000,000 AND $150,000,000;
orig_question: Provide the names of superheroes with attribute value between 75 to 80.  names of superheroes refers to superhero_name; attribute value between 75 to 80 refers to attribute_value BETWEEN 75 AND 80;
orig_masked: Provide the [C28] of [T9] with [C10] between [V1] to [V2].  [C28] of [T9] refers to [C28]; [C10] between [V1] to [V2] refers to [C10] BETWEEN [V1] AND [V2];; [V1] is a value of the column [C10]; [V2] is a value of the column [C10]
evidence: heroes of movies refers to hero; total gross between $100,000,000 to $150,000,000 refers to total_gross BETWEEN $100,000,000 AND $150,000,000;
orig_evidence: names of superheroes refers to superhero_name; attribute value between 75 to 80 refers to attribute_value BETWEEN 75 AND 80;
gold_sql: SELECT T2.hero from movies_total_gross as T1 INNER JOIN characters as T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie_title WHERE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(T1.total_gross, '$', ''), ',', '') AS FLOAT) BETWEEN 100000000 AND 150000000
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id WHERE T2.attribute_value BETWEEN 75 AND 80

question: List all the names of the businesses that had a risk category of High Risk? names of the businesses refers to businesses.name; risk category refers to violations.risk_category; risk_category = High Risk;
orig_question: List all the short name of the football team that had a home team goal of 10? short name of the football team refers to team_short_name; home team goal refers to home_team_goal; home_team_goal = 10;
orig_masked: List all the [C174] of the [T6] that had a [C94] of [V1]? [C174] of the [T6] refers to [C174]; [C94] refers to [C94]; [C94] = [V1];; [V1] is a value of the column [C94]
evidence: names of the businesses refers to businesses.name; risk category refers to violations.risk_category; risk_category = High Risk;
orig_evidence: short name of the football team refers to team_short_name; home team goal refers to home_team_goal; home_team_goal = 10;
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM businesses as T1 INNER JOIN violations as T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T2.risk_category = 'High Risk'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t1.team_short_name FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.home_team_api_id WHERE t2.home_team_goal = 10

question: Among the customers, how many wholesale customers who were placing orders in 2016 and stayed in 2017? Customers refer to customer; wholesale refers to cust_type = 'wholesaler'; order dates appear in column ship_date
orig_question: Among the account opened, how many female customers who were born before 1950 and stayed in Sokolov? Customers refer to clients; Female refers to gender = 'F'; Names of districts appear in column A2
orig_masked: Among the [T1], how many [C12] [T3] who were [C9] before [V2] and stayed in [V1]? [T3] refer to [T3]; [C12] refers to [C12] = '[V3]'; [C24] appear in column [C24]; [V1] is a value of the column [C24]; [V2] is a value of the column [C9]; [V3] is a value of the column [C12]
evidence: Customers refer to customer; wholesale refers to cust_type = 'wholesaler'; order dates appear in column ship_date
orig_evidence: Customers refer to clients; Female refers to gender = 'F'; Names of districts appear in column A2
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT cust_id) FROM customer WHERE cust_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT cust_id FROM shipment WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', ship_date) = '2016') AND cust_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT cust_id FROM shipment WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', ship_date) = '2017')
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.client_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.gender = 'F' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.birth_date) < '1950' AND T1.A2 = 'Sokolov'

question: Please provide the name of the console that generated the highest single region sales. name refers to platform_name; console refers to platform; generated the highest single region sales refers to MAX(num_sales)
orig_question: Please provide the full name of the away team that scored the most goals. full name refers to team_long_name; away team refers to away_team_api_id; scored the most goals refers to MAX(away_team_goal)
orig_masked: Please provide the [C173] of the [C39] that [C40]. [C173] refers to [C173]; [C39] refers to [C39]; [C40] refers to MAX([C40])
evidence: name refers to platform_name; console refers to platform; generated the highest single region sales refers to MAX(num_sales)
orig_evidence: full name refers to team_long_name; away team refers to away_team_api_id; scored the most goals refers to MAX(away_team_goal)
gold_sql: SELECT T1.platform_name FROM platform as T1 INNER JOIN game_platform as T2 ON T1.id = T2.platform_id INNER JOIN region_sales as T3 ON T2.id = T3.game_platform_id ORDER BY T3.num_sales DESC LIMIT 1
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.team_long_name FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS t2 ON t1.away_team_api_id = t2.team_api_id ORDER BY t1.away_team_goal DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which movies have total gross revenues more than $100,000,000? Please list their songs. total gross revenues refers to total_gross; total_gross > $100,000,000; songs refers to characters.song;
orig_question: Which teams have build up play passing more than 70? Please list their short names. build up play passing refers to buildUpPlayPassing; buildUpPlayPassing > 70; short names refers to team_short_name;
orig_masked: Which [T6] have [C177] more than [V1]? Please list their [C174]. [C177] refers to [C177]; [C177] > [V1]; [C174] refers to [C174];; [V1] is a value of the column [C177]
evidence: total gross revenues refers to total_gross; total_gross > $100,000,000; songs refers to characters.song;
orig_evidence: build up play passing refers to buildUpPlayPassing; buildUpPlayPassing > 70; short names refers to team_short_name;
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.song FROM movies_total_gross as T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.movie_title = T2.movie_title WHERE T2.song IS NOT NULL AND CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(T1.total_gross, '$', ''), ',', '') AS FLOAT) > 100000000
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.team_short_name FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.buildUpPlayPassing > 70

question: What is the average height of the athletes from China?  athletes from China refers to region_name = 'China'; average height of the athletes refers to AVG(height)
orig_question: What is the average height of the superheroes from Marvel Comics?  superheroes from Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'; average height of the superheroes refers to AVG(height_cm)
orig_masked: What is the average [C23] of the [T9] from [V1]?  [T9] from [V1] refers to [C15] = '[V1]'; average [C23] of the [T9] refers to AVG([C23]); [V1] is a value of the column [C15]
evidence: athletes from China refers to region_name = 'China'; average height of the athletes refers to AVG(height)
orig_evidence: superheroes from Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'; average height of the superheroes refers to AVG(height_cm)
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.height) FROM person as T1 INNER JOIN person_region as T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region as T3 ON T2.region_id = T3.id WHERE T3.region_name = 'China'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.height_cm) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

question: Give the name of the region had the most athletes with equal body dimensions in the male gender? most athletes with equal body dimensions refers to MAX(SUM(person.height = person.weight)); male gender refers to gender = 'M';
orig_question: Give the name of the league had the most matches end as draw in the 2016 season? most matches end as draw refers to MAX(SUM(home_team_goal = away_team_goal)); 2016 season refers to season = '2015/2016';
orig_masked: Give the [C5] of the [T2] had the most [C94],[C40] in the [C108] [C108]? most [C94],[C40] refers to MAX(SUM([C94] = [C40])); [C108] [C108] refers to [C108] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C108]
evidence: most athletes with equal body dimensions refers to MAX(SUM(person.height = person.weight)); male gender refers to gender = 'M';
orig_evidence: most matches end as draw refers to MAX(SUM(home_team_goal = away_team_goal)); 2016 season refers to season = '2015/2016';
gold_sql: SELECT T3.region_name FROM person AS T1 INNER JOIN person_region AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region as T3 ON T2.region_id = T3.id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND T1.height = T1.weight GROUP BY T3.region_name ORDER BY count(DISTINCT T1.id) DESC LIMIT 1
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.name FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.league_id = t2.id WHERE t1.season = '2015/2016' AND t1.home_team_goal = t1.away_team_goal GROUP BY t2.name ORDER BY COUNT(t1.id) DESC LIMIT 1
